title: Forty-nine new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 10
summary: On March 10, YKHC reports forty-nine new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 49 are residents in: Akiachak (6) Akiak (2) Alakanuk (2) Bethel (9) Chevak (1) Emmonak (3) Grayling (1) Holy Cross (5) Marshall (1) Mekoryuk (5) Mountain Village (6) Russian Mission (1) St. Mary’s (4)...

title: BSNC Shareholder Roberta “Buffy” McKay’s Poetry is Published
summary: BSNC shareholder and poet Roberta “Buffy” McKay recently had her poetry titled Salt & Roses published by Cirque Press. In Salt & Roses, McKay looks hard at life across a range of free verse, villanelles and haikus. McKay, who is of Inupiaq and Scottish descent, enjoys writing about memory, time and...

title: YKHC notes increase in patients requiring additional naloxone to reverse street drug overdose
summary: The Emergency Department at the Yukon-Kuskowim Delta Regional Hospital has seen an uptick in the number of patients in the past week who required many times the typical dose of naloxone (often known by the brand name, Narcan) to reverse a street drug overdose. Medical staff believe it is likely due...

title: Voices of Alaska: Trooper Anne Sears
summary: Anne Sears was the first Alaska Native woman to serve as a trooper and at the time of her retirement was still the only Alaska Native female in the force. The post Voices of Alaska: Trooper Anne Sears appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
